title: Metal Polish #1 Buffing Compound Removes Oxidation For Jewelry
description:
The #1 Hard Metal Cleaner & Polish is a great addition to any household or workshop. Each container comes with a solid 2.2 oz polishing stick, similar in consistency to a crayon. This polish is ideal for heavy duty cleaning hard metals. Simply attach it to a polishing or buffing wheel, and watch your metal items be removed of burs, corrosion and scratches!

Metal Polish #1 Buffing Compound Removes Oxidation For Jewelry

The #1 Hard Metal Cleaner & Polish is a great addition to any household or workshop. Each container comes with a solid 2.2 oz polishing stick, similar in consistency to a crayon.

Key Features

  • #1 Hard Metal Cleaner & Polish Compound
  • Will Polish All Hard Metals
  • Ideal for Heavy Duty Cleaning of Iron & Steel
  • Solid Stick - 2.2 oz | .14 lbs
  • Great for Use At Home, In Workshops, Garage, etc.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 1HGMP-1-973
  • UPC: 145148962817
  • Color: Multi Colored
  • Size: Medium

This polish is ideal for heavy duty cleaning hard metals. Simply attach it to a polishing or buffing wheel, and watch your metal items be removed of burs, corrosion and scratches!
